prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次依次为271→260→274→268→300名，近5年位次在260–300区间窄幅波动；2025年基准位次约300名，较2024年（268名）后移约32名，为近年最高值，显示竞争略有缓和；该校在广西理科/物理类计划数：2021–2024年均为27人，2025年增至28人，2026年（招生计划文件）进一步扩至30人，较2025年扩招约7.1%，扩招幅度较为明显，对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021–2026年连续稳居第7名，属全国顶尖高校（Top20），办学层次极高，对考生吸引力持续强劲；2025年高考周期声誉评价偏正面（李政道先生与少年班渊源等科研成果荣誉）；2026年周期出现个别师德师风负面事件但影响有限；抖音综合热度排名第12（高热），短视频曝光量大，反映报考关注度较高；未见投档线异常或断档记录；第五轮学科评估中A-及以上学科达19个，其中数学、物理学、化学、天文学、地球物理学、生物学、科学技术史、安全科学与工程等8个学科获评A+，学科实力极为突出，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年广西物理类考生估算约26.4万人，较2025年（26.0万人）小幅增加约1.5%，竞争略有加剧；中国科学技术大学位于安徽省合肥市，在广西招生计划近年约27–30人，占该校全国招生总量比例较小（约2–3%），属跨省招生，无显著地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次300名、2026年扩招约7.1%（缓解竞争）、广西物理类考生小幅增加约1.5%（略加剧竞争）以及学校顶尖层次与高热关注度，扩招效应略大于考生增量，预计2026年最低位次较2025年小幅后移；预测最低位次约313名，波动区间263–363名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 数学类（含华罗庚数学科技英才班、中法数学英才班）
- 工科试验班（拔尖计划英才班）（含华夏计算机科技英才班、信息科技英才班）
- 量子信息科学（未来技术学院）
- 人工智能（含人工智能科技英才班）
- 计算机类（含华夏计算机科技英才班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（集成电路方向）（含中微集成电路科技英才班）
- 网络空间安全（含王小谟网络空间科技英才班）
- 电子信息类（信息科技方向）（含信息科技英才班、王大珩科技英才班）
- 工科试验班（航空航天、人形机器人、低碳能源技术及安全）（含多个科技英才班）
- 理科试验班类（拔尖计划科技英才班）（含华罗庚数学、严济慈物理英才班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 物理学类（含严济慈物理科技英才班等12个英才班）
- 理科试验班类（统计与大数据技术试验班）（含中美合作3+X项目）
- 核工程类（含工程物理、核工程与核技术、应用物理学）
- 化学类（含卢嘉锡化学科技英才班）
- 生物科学类（含贝时璋生命科技英才班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约313名，波动区间263–363名。位次在263名以内可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（数学类、计算机类、人工智能、量子信息科学等）；位次在313名附近建议以二档为主（电子信息类、网络空间安全、工科试验班等），兼顾一档冲刺；位次在363名附近建议以三档保底（物理学类、核工程类、化学类等），同时可尝试二档专业。该校专业均含英才班或特色培养方案，学科评估A类占比极高，整体报考价值突出。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were 271 → 260 → 274 → 268 → 300, fluctuating narrowly within the 260–300 range over the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 300, shifting back by about 32 places compared to 2024 (268), the highest in recent years, indicating a slight easing of competition; the university's enrollment plan in Guangxi for Science/Physics Category: 27 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 28 in 2025, and further expanding to 30 in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document), an increase of about 7.1% over 2025, a relatively significant expansion that helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; consistently ranked 7th in the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the top national universities (Top 20), with an extremely high level of education, continuously attracting strong interest from candidates; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was relatively positive (e.g., the connection between Tsung-Dao Lee and the Special Class for the Gifted Young, scientific research achievements, and honors); in the 2026 cycle, there were isolated negative incidents regarding teacher ethics but with limited impact; comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking 12th (high heat), with significant short video exposure, reflecting high attention from applicants; no abnormal or gap records in admission cutoffs; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 19 disciplines were rated A- or above, including 8 disciplines rated A+: Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Astronomy, Geophysics, Biology, History of Science and Technology, and Safety Science and Engineering, with extremely outstanding disciplinary strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in Guangxi is about 264,000, a slight increase of about 1.5% compared to 2025 (260,000), slightly intensifying competition; the University of Science and Technology of China is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, with an enrollment plan in Guangxi of about 27–30 students in recent years, accounting for a small proportion of the university's total national enrollment (about 2–3%), making it a cross-provincial enrollment with no significant regional preference influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 300, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 7.1% (alleviating competition), the slight increase of about 1.5% in Guangxi Physics Category candidates (slightly intensifying competition), and the university's top-tier level and high popularity, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the candidate increase, so the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to shift back slightly compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 313, with a fluctuation range of 263–363.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Mathematics (including Hua Luogeng Mathematics Science and Technology Elite Class, Sino-French Mathematics Elite Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Top Talent Plan Elite Class) (including Huaxia Computer Science and Technology Elite Class, Information Science and Technology Elite Class)
- Quantum Information Science (School of Future Technology)
- Artificial Intelligence (including Artificial Intelligence Science and Technology Elite Class)
- Computer Science (including Huaxia Computer Science and Technology Elite Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (Integrated Circuit Direction) (including AMEC Integrated Circuit Science and Technology Elite Class)
- Cyberspace Security (including Wang Xiaomo Cyberspace Science and Technology Elite Class)
- Electronic Information (Information Technology Direction) (including Information Science and Technology Elite Class, Wang Daheng Science and Technology Elite Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace, Humanoid Robots, Low-Carbon Energy Technology and Safety) (including multiple Science and Technology Elite Classes)
- Science Experimental Class (Top Talent Plan Science and Technology Elite Class) (including Hua Luogeng Mathematics, Yan Jici Physics Elite Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Physics (including Yan Jici Physics Science and Technology Elite Class and 12 other Elite Classes)
- Science Experimental Class (Statistics and Big Data Technology Experimental Class) (including Sino-US Cooperation 3+X Program)
- Nuclear Engineering (including Engineering Physics, Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology, Applied Physics)
- Chemistry (including Lu Jiaxi Chemistry Science and Technology Elite Class)
- Biological Sciences (including Bei Shizhang Life Science and Technology Elite Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 313, fluctuation range 263–363. Candidates with rankings within 263 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Mathematics, Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Quantum Information Science, etc.); candidates with rankings around 313 are advised to mainly target Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information, Cyberspace Security, Engineering Experimental Class, etc.), while also attempting Tier 1 sprinting; candidates with rankings around 363 are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options (Physics, Nuclear Engineering, Chemistry, etc.), while also trying Tier 2 majors. All majors at this university include Elite Classes or special training programs, with a very high proportion of A-level disciplines in the discipline evaluation, making the overall application value outstanding.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Science and Technology of China
